_comment: Batch-size knowledge base for bulkops' dynamic sizing (ROADMAP #15).
Git-tracked and human-curated, like field_synonyms.json: this file is
the cross-project source of truth; per-project observations live in
dbo.BulkOpsLog and never overwrite this file automatically. When a
real migration converges on a better number for an object, run
`suggest-batch-heuristics` and commit the change here deliberately,
so the next project starts from what the last one learned.
All sizing moves along `ladder` -- a small set of standard rungs, so
every recommendation is a comparable, memorable value instead of an
arbitrary computed one. Adjustments are expressed in whole rungs.
Why per-object seeds at all: Bulk API 2.0 has no server-side
adaptivity -- it never inspects an org's automation to size batches,
so any 'common sense' about notoriously automation-heavy objects has

risk_adjustments._comment: Rungs DOWN the ladder per signal from dbo.ObjectAutomationRisk (analyze-org-risk, ROADMAP #5). Applied cumulatively.

history_rules._comment: Reactions to this org's own dbo.BulkOpsLog history (ROADMAP #14). Lock errors are UNABLE_TO_LOCK_ROW rows written back by a prior run.

Opportunity.why: OOTB heavy: forecasting recalculation, Account rollup pressure, and almost every real org piles triggers/Flows onto it

OpportunityLineItem.why: Every row locks its parent Opportunity and recalculates Amount/Quantity rollups -- classic UNABLE_TO_LOCK_ROW source

OpportunityContactRole.why: Locks the parent Opportunity, lighter automation than line items

Case.why: Assignment rules, escalation rules, entitlements/milestones commonly fire on insert

Order.why: Status-driven locking; frequently CPQ/Billing-adjacent with heavy automation

OrderItem.why: Locks the parent Order; rollup pressure like OpportunityLineItem

CampaignMember.why: Each row locks both its Campaign and its Lead/Contact -- two-sided lock contention

PricebookEntry.why: Locks the parent Pricebook2 and Product2

Event.why: Same WhoId/WhatId parent locking as Task

User.why: Role/territory changes trigger org-wide sharing recalculation -- keep user loads tiny and expect them to be slow

AccountContactRelation.why: Locks both the Account and the Contact

SBQQ__.why: CPQ-grade automation: quote/line calculations cascade across objects (see docs/MIGRATION_PLAYBOOK.md batching guidance)

vlocity_cmt__.why: Industries (Vlocity) objects carry heavy managed automation

npsp__.why: Nonprofit Success Pack rollup triggers fire broadly
